task_completion.description: Find and open the 'Defective Office Chair' quality alert.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Quality module is open and the quality alert titled 'Defective Office Chair' is visible on the screen, either in a list view or opened in a form view.

task_completion.description: Edit the quality alert to link it to a transfer/receipt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Defective Office Chair' alert is in edit mode, and the agent is interacting with the 'Transfer', 'Picking', or 'Receipt' field (e.g., opening the dropdown to search for a receipt).

task_completion.description: Link the quality alert to the receipt originating from PO998877.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Transfer/Receipt field is populated with a receipt record that is explicitly associated with the source document 'PO998877'.

task_completion.description: Update the priority of the quality alert to 2 stars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Priority field on the quality alert form has exactly 2 stars highlighted or selected.
The quality alert form is saved (read-only mode) and displays both the linked receipt for PO998877 and the 2-star priority.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions are performed within the Odoo web interface in a browser, with no terminal or command-line windows used to execute API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Odoo Quality module being navigated and edited, rather than a text editor or static mock page.

integrity.description: Agent used standard UI elements to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes to the transfer field and priority stars are made via standard dropdowns and clicks, without evidence of browser developer tools (Inspect Element) being used to fake the visual state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target quality alert is exactly named 'Defective Office Chair'. It must be linked to a receipt/transfer originating from 'PO998877'. Note on Priority: The task asks for 'High (2 stars)'. In Odoo, 2 stars might be labeled 'Urgent' instead of 'High'. The VLM should verify that exactly 2 stars are selected for the priority, regardless of the text label.
